resultList.dtldesc: Step into this inviting 3 BHK flat for sale in RV Advaita, Kukatpally, Hyderabad, where modern living meets traditional values with its vaastu compliant design. This east-facing gem is ready to move in, offering a seamless transition into your new home.Property Specifications This spacious 3 BHK flat offers a generous super area of 1860 sqft and is located on the third floor of a well-structured building with a total of five floors. The semi-furnished interior features wardrobes, lights, and fans, providing a comfortable living environment.The layout includes three bedrooms and three bathroomstwo attached and one commonall designed in a modern western style. Enjoy the fresh air from two balconies, one attached to the kitchen and another in the living area, both overlooking the road. The living cum dining area is perfect for family gatherings, while the modular kitchen with a chimney and an attached utility area adds to the convenience. With vitrified tiles throughout, this flat combines style and functionality. Facilities Additional facilities include covered parking for two vehicles, 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, and 100 power backup. Security is ensured with a guard on duty and CCTV surveillance. The building also features a lift for easy access, making this property an ideal choice for modern living.Locality The locality surrounding this property is vibrant and well-connected, with Creek International School, IDL Lake Road, and Ashoka Mall all within a 100-meter radius. A multi-speciality hospital nearby ensures easy access to healthcare services.Public transport options are readily available, with buses and auto-rickshaws frequently servicing the area. Convenient banking facilities, including banks and ATMs, are also close by. For commuters, the railway station is just 10 km away, while the metro station is a mere 300 meters from your doorstep, providing excellent connectivity to the rest of the city.
